'''Tendir Blue''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] agent working for the [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]]. He was heavyset, with red hair, freckles, and crooked teeth. Tendir was used by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] and [[Ylenic It'kla]] to help extract [[Ratri Tane]] and his family from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].

==Extraneous==
Blue's first name was misspelled as "Tendril" in the last appearance of his name in the short story ''[[Elusion Illusion]].''
